data.description:
Address: 50 Zarmavdian Street

Wares: Beverages, meals, lodging.

Despite its name, The Rowdy Rockfish is the quietest and quaintest of Otari's taverns. A sign depicting a rockfish with his fins up in a boxing pose hangs above the door of this two-story wooden structure, but within, the calm demeanor of its patrons leads some to wonder if this might be the one tavern in the Inner Sea to never host a barroom brawl.

The Rockfish's current proprietor is a matronly dwarf named Brelda Venkervale, a stoic but shrewd businesswoman who took over the bar after her son Lasda Venkervale, the previous owner, vanished without a trace. A few locals saw the red-bearded Lasda walking out of town with a hooded stranger carrying a lantern. Over a year has passed, and Brelda suspects that her son is gone for good.

description.value: Grilled fish, squid, and roasted vegetables, marinated in a smoky citrus glaze.
Slow-cooked boar with barley and root vegetables.
Light and floral gin distilled with forest herbs
Giant mushrooms stuffed with goat cheese and herbs.
Crispy-fried sea nettles with spiced kelp aioli.
Grilled fish, squid, and roasted vegetables, marinated in a smoky citrus glaze.
Herbal tea with fresh mint and honey.
Grilled rockfish and roasted boar with wild greens.
The tavern’s house brew, dark and hearty.
Grilled fish, squid, and roasted vegetables, marinated in a smoky citrus glaze.
